message:
fix(http): add validation for protocol edge cases

HTTP/1.1 (stream.rs):
- Detect incomplete chunked encoding in IncomingBodyWriter::finish()
- Return BadChunkedEncoding if finish called without terminal chunk
- Add test: incoming_body_chunked_finish_incomplete_errors

HTTP/2 (frame.rs):
- Reject HEADERS frames where stream depends on itself
- Reject PRIORITY frames where stream depends on itself
- Both return ProtocolError per RFC 7540 Section 5.3.1:
  "A stream cannot depend on itself"

These checks prevent protocol violations that could cause undefined
behavior in stream state machines or resource exhaustion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
